footer.tagline: Senior full-stack web developer / Lead Dev / Tech Lead

hero.bio: I build and maintain product sites, brand sites, user interfaces, e-commerce platforms and business tools.
hero.subtitle: 10 years of experience, mostly in digital agencies. Strong PHP and JavaScript skills, CMS expertise applied to complex, demanding projects, with constant attention to code quality and the long-term reliability of technical choices.

aboutSection.paragraph1: For 10 years I've supported B2B companies across every sector on complex web projects, from technical scoping through to maintenance.
aboutSection.paragraph2: A Drupal and WordPress expert, comfortable with modern PHP/JavaScript stacks, I build websites and web apps meant to last: fast, accessible, and easy to evolve.
aboutSection.highlight1: 10 years of experience in digital agencies
aboutSection.highlight2: Drupal & WordPress expert, strong in PHP & JavaScript

cms.description: Content management and rapid prototyping depending on the project.

gingerminds.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer, Tech Lead
gingerminds.intro: Contributed to more than 50 client projects across a range of sectors such as construction, industry, healthcare, energy, insurance & mutual funds, and agriculture and agri-food, many of which are still in production today.
points: Develop and maintain product sites, brand sites, user interfaces, e-commerce platforms and business tools
Act as Tech Lead / Lead Dev on recurring client projects, share best practices, support teams
Handle corrective, evolutive and application maintenance by analyzing and resolving technical issues, bugs and incidents
Industrialize internal starter kits (WordPress and Drupal): standardization, CI/CD and reusable components for project foundations
Carry out code reviews and quality audits (performance, SEO, security, RGAA accessibility)
Implement tracking and analytics solutions to measure and optimize site performance (Matomo, Google Analytics)
Keep an active watch on new practices and share knowledge within a multidisciplinary team
Take part in agency life: onboarding, CSE member, and member of the Happiness team in charge of wellbeing initiatives

donJigiFest.title: Webdesigner, Web Developer
donJigiFest.description: Designed and built the festival's website for the 2018, 2019 and 2020 editions.

chSimoneVeil.title: Back-End Web Developer
chSimoneVeil.description: Corrective and evolutive maintenance of an internal medical-transport request management application.

projectsPage.title: My work
projectsPage.subtitle: Discover a selection of projects I've contributed to throughout my professional experience. These projects showcase my work at Gingerminds, where I helped build websites for clients across a range of sectors:
projectsPage.subtitleSectors: construction, industry, healthcare, energy, insurance & mutual funds, agriculture and agri-food
projectsPage.subtitleClosing: Many of these sites are still in production today, a testament to their durability and reliability.
projectsPage.subtitlePersonal: You'll also find a selection of my personal web projects, built as part of my ongoing technology watch and skill development. They let me experiment with new technologies, deepen my knowledge, and continuously grow my skills.

clientsSection.introTitle: A selection of clients I've supported
clientsSection.introSubtitle: Over 10 years supporting businesses across every sector on their web projects.
clientsSection.title: Companies across every B2B sector

vygon.title: Vygon - multi-country platform
vygon.tagline: Corporate site and product catalog for Vygon, an international medical device manufacturer present in over 120 countries.
vygon.contexte: Vygon designs and distributes medical devices across many specialties (vascular access, enteral nutrition, anaesthesia, surgery...), through subsidiaries and distributors in over 120 countries. The site needed to reflect a dense product catalog while staying consistent from one country to the next.
vygon.solution: A Drupal platform organized as per-country sites (dedicated subdomains), with a shared multilingual content architecture and a product catalog structured by medical specialty.
points: Multi-site Drupal architecture with one subdomain per country
Shared multilingual content management across markets
Product catalog structured across around ten medical specialties
Common editorial templates keeping brand consistency between countries
vygon.resultat: A robust platform, deployed across many countries, that still serves as Vygon's international showcase today.

saur.title: Saur & Nijhuis
saur.tagline: WordPress institutional website for Saur, an international water management group, and its subsidiary Nijhuis Industries.
saur.impact: Institutional site delivered for Saur and Nijhuis Industries
saur.contexte: Saur is an international water management group (drinking water production and distribution, wastewater collection and treatment) for local authorities and industrial clients, notably through its subsidiary Nijhuis Industries, specialized in industrial water treatment technologies.
saur.solution: Institutional website built on WordPress by the Gingerminds agency, showcasing the activities of the Saur group and its subsidiary Nijhuis Industries.
points: WordPress development
Design and integration of the institutional website
Showcasing the group's activities and its Nijhuis subsidiary

boralex.title: Boralex
boralex.tagline: Design and development of the institutional website for Boralex, a renewable energy producer.
boralex.contexte: Boralex develops and operates renewable energy facilities (wind, solar, hydroelectric, storage) across North America and Europe, with over 20 years of presence in France.
boralex.solution: Design, Drupal development and SEO for the site, delivered by the Gingerminds agency.
points: Art direction and design for the institutional website
Drupal development
Search engine optimization (SEO)

groupeTechna.title: Techna - unified digital ecosystem
groupeTechna.tagline: Consolidated 6 websites into a single platform to reposition Techna, an independent animal nutrition specialist.
groupeTechna.impact: Consolidated digital ecosystem, still in production
groupeTechna.contexte: Techna, an independent animal nutrition specialist (€60M revenue, 310 employees), wanted to strengthen its leadership in France and accelerate international growth by streamlining its brand portfolio.
groupeTechna.solution: Unified the group's digital presence: consolidated six websites into one, built a new brand identity reflecting industrial expertise and R&D, and structured content around four customer segments (industrial integrators, distributors, farm feed producers, equine enthusiasts).
points: Consolidated six websites into a single platform
New brand identity reflecting industrial capability, innovation and R&D
Content architecture targeting four distinct customer segments
Optimized SEO management and scientific-expertise content
groupeTechna.resultat: A strategic website supporting Techna's growth in France and internationally, with optimized SEO and content highlighting its precision animal nutrition expertise.

chtiiing.title: Chtiiing
chtiiing.tagline: Website for the Nantes Creativity Days, showcasing 87 local artists.
chtiiing.contexte: Chtiiing is Nantes' flagship creativity event, run by Nantes Métropole and Samoa, bringing together artists and creative players from the region over several days.
chtiiing.solution: A WordPress site presenting the 87 participating artists, each with a dedicated contact form, random navigation through virtual aisles, and 100% of the generated revenue passed on to the artists.
points: WordPress site showcasing 87 artists
Dedicated contact form for each artist
Random navigation through virtual aisles
100% of generated revenue passed on to the artists

lnaSante.title: LNA Santé
lnaSante.tagline: Overhauled the LNA Santé group's digital ecosystem, spanning a corporate site and per-facility microsites.
lnaSante.impact: Corporate platform and microsites still in production
lnaSante.contexte: A 30-year-old French healthcare group (7,500 employees, 85 facilities in France and Belgium, €535M revenue), LNA Santé needed to redesign its digital presence to address both commercial goals (occupancy rates) and HR needs (recruitment).
lnaSante.solution: Ran stakeholder workshops and on-site facility immersions to scope the need, led UX/UI work to sharpen positioning, and built a WordPress platform offering flexible content management: one corporate site plus customizable microsites per facility, manageable by a single in-house admin.
points: Stakeholder workshops and on-site facility immersions
UX/UI work to sharpen the group's positioning
WordPress platform: corporate site + per-facility microsites
Flexible content management, run by a single in-house admin
lnaSante.resultat: A complete showcase of the group's offering with distinctive positioning, generating leads for facility occupancy and supporting recruitment.

onetBusiness.title: Onet Business Services
onetBusiness.tagline: Redesigned the Onet group's institutional website for an efficient, straightforward and pleasant experience.
onetBusiness.contexte: France's leading business-services company (facility management, cleaning, security, reception...), including operations in extreme-environment settings, Onet wanted to strengthen brand visibility and employer appeal through a full site overhaul.
onetBusiness.solution: UX workshops for content inventory and hierarchy, co-design sessions for user journeys, and webmarketing guidance. Built on WordPress/Elementor with a content architecture structured around the group's business units.
points: UX workshops for content inventory and hierarchy
Co-design sessions for user journeys
WordPress / Elementor implementation
Content architecture structured by business unit
onetBusiness.resultat: A legible group brand identity showcasing subsidiary brands, client references and expertise, with strengthened employer appeal.

preciaMolen.title: Precia Molen
preciaMolen.tagline: Institutional website for Precia Molen, a specialist in industrial and commercial weighing.
preciaMolen.contexte: Precia Molen has designed industrial and commercial weighing solutions (scales, silos, continuous dosing) for over 70 years, with a presence in more than 140 countries.
preciaMolen.solution: Site built on Drupal by the Gingerminds agency.
points: Drupal development

akena.title: Akena Vérandas
akena.tagline: Designed the Akena group's websites to generate qualified leads for its 70-strong dealer network.
akena.contexte: National leader in custom-made verandas, pergolas and pool enclosures for 40 years, Akena needed a coherent digital ecosystem across its various sites to showcase its work and generate qualified leads for its dealer network.
akena.solution: Multi-site Drupal 8 environment with a modular architecture, content hierarchy rebuilt around lead generation, refined brand identity, integrated editorial strategy and deep mobile optimization. Interfaced with the OPleads commercial tool to support field sales teams.
points: Multi-site Drupal 8 environment with a modular architecture
Content hierarchy rebuilt around lead generation
Integrated editorial strategy and deep mobile optimization
Interfaced with the OPleads commercial management tool
akena.resultat: A mobile-first platform that turns visits into qualified leads, still driving Akena's customer acquisition today.

groupeSamseRecrute.title: Groupe SAMSE Recrute
groupeSamseRecrute.tagline: Redesigned Groupe SAMSE's employer-brand website to meet strong hiring needs on hard-to-fill roles.
groupeSamseRecrute.contexte: A major building-materials distribution group, Groupe SAMSE needed to modernize its employer-brand website to boost its appeal for hard-to-fill roles, while preserving the identity of each of its retail brands.
groupeSamseRecrute.solution: An editorial charter for a consistent brand voice, storytelling for in-demand roles, and a "perfect match" module to check compatibility with the group. Content architecture, UX/UI, Drupal CMS, HRIS interfacing and SEO.
points: Editorial charter for a consistent brand voice
Storytelling for in-demand roles
Candidate/company "perfect match" module
Drupal CMS, HRIS interfacing and SEO optimization
groupeSamseRecrute.resultat: A redesigned candidate experience with intuitive navigation and targeted job visibility, supporting the group's recruitment.

donJigiFest.title: Don Jigi Fest
donJigiFest.tagline: Website for the Don Jigi Fest music festival, designed and built for the 2018, 2019 and 2020 editions.
donJigiFest.contexte: Don Jigi Fest is a music festival held in Vitré, run by a volunteer team.
donJigiFest.solution: Designed and built the festival's website for the 2018, 2019 and 2020 editions, as a volunteer.
points: Designed and built the festival website
2018, 2019 and 2020 editions

greentech.title: Greentech
greentech.tagline: Custom e-commerce site with in-store click-and-collect reservation, for the Greentech retailer in Dakar.
greentech.impact: E-commerce site delivered with in-store reservation
greentech.contexte: Greentech is a retailer based in Dakar, Senegal, that wanted to offer an online shopping experience with in-store pickup.
greentech.solution: Built a custom e-commerce site with a click-and-collect reservation system, as part of an internship.
points: Custom e-commerce site
In-store click-and-collect reservation

groupeScolaireLaSalleSaintJoseph.title: Groupe Scolaire La Salle Saint Joseph
groupeScolaireLaSalleSaintJoseph.tagline: Multi-site information portal and news blog for Groupe Scolaire La Salle Saint Joseph.
groupeScolaireLaSalleSaintJoseph.impact: Multi-site portal delivered with dedicated SEO
groupeScolaireLaSalleSaintJoseph.contexte: Groupe Scolaire La Salle Saint Joseph, in Argentré-du-Plessis, wanted to unify communication across its schools and make it easier to publish news.
groupeScolaireLaSalleSaintJoseph.solution: Full-stack development of a multi-site information portal and a news blog with SEO, as part of an internship.
points: Multi-site information portal
News blog with SEO

ludmigo.title: Ludmigo
ludmigo.tagline: A community platform for sharing and discovering board games, making it easy to find people and places to play.
ludmigo.impact: With Ludmigo, let's democratize board games!
ludmigo.contexte: It doesn't matter whether you're a beginner or an amateur, what counts is the desire to share a convivial moment and meet up over a game. This can take place in dedicated venues already present in their town, or in bars that we can help develop this service with in their establishments.
ludmigo.solution: A Laravel back-end with Vue-powered interfaces, letting players find games and venues, and letting establishments offer their spaces.
points: Connects beginner and amateur players around board game sessions
Directory of dedicated venues (game libraries, partner bars...)
Support for establishments wanting to develop this service
Laravel back-end, Vue interfaces

portfolio.title: Portfolio - Maxime Jolivet
portfolio.tagline: Personal site: portfolio, interactive resume and technical blog, designed and built from scratch.
portfolio.contexte: After several redesigns, I wanted a site that reflects both my craft as a developer and my design sensibility: fast, accessible, bilingual, and easy to evolve alongside my projects and articles.
portfolio.solution: A Nuxt 4 site statically generated and deployed on GitHub Pages, with a Tailwind v4 + shadcn-vue design system, a Supabase-backed blog, and a fully bilingual French/English interface.
points: Nuxt 4 static site generation (SSG), auto-deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions
Tailwind v4 + shadcn-vue (Reka UI) design system, light/dark theme
Supabase-backed blog, bilingual articles managed through a data table
Full FR/EN internationalization with localized routes (/fr, /en)
portfolio.resultat: A fast, fully static site that's easy to maintain, serving as a showcase, an interactive resume, and a testing ground for new front-end practices.

blog.title: What the code teaches me
blog.subtitle: Practical insights from real-world experience with migrations, modern CSS, developer tooling, and AI. No listicles—just thoughtful analysis, hands-on experiments, and proven solutions from real projects.

data.title: Personal data
data.intro: This site does not collect any personal data for advertising or profiling purposes.
data.body: The only data that may be collected is what you voluntarily share by email or through the contact or booking form. It is used solely to respond to your request and is never sold or shared with third parties.
data.closing: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure or objection by writing to {email}.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.intro: This site uses Google Tag Manager and the Cal.com scheduling service, which may set cookies, only after you give consent.
cookies.body: A banner lets you accept, decline, or customize these cookies on your first visit. You can change your choices at any time via the "Manage cookies" link at the bottom of the page. Only cookies strictly necessary for the site to function (remembering your language and consent choice) are set without prior consent.
